title: Samdhin Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Samdhin, with a Z-Score of +3.66. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Samdhin is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 11.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 38%, and the wind speed is approximately 6.7 km/h, which is not providing any significant relief from the heat. 
 The absence of any significant Heating Degree Days (HDD) indicates that the temperature has consistently remained high, with no respite from the heat wave.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave in Samdhin.
